# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# ARM Template for Network Security Group with Remote Desktop (RDP, port=3389), SSH (port = 22) , HTTP (Port 80 ), HTTPS( Port =443 ) and any source IPs.   For a flexible team access across globe please make sure to include the correct Azure CIDR notation for your region in subscription
resources:
- name: networkSecurityGroupRule_SSH        # unique id of rule 1          // replace with meaningful values if reused after template execution      - resourceName         Security Group            Inbound       tcp    port=22             AnySource   VirtualNetwork     Allow              (comment is optional)                
- name: networkSecurityGroupRule_HTTP           # repeat for all other rules to be added here          Resource Name                   Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound/Outbound    Action         Comment            // replace with meaningful values if reused after template execution
- name: networkSecurityGroupRule_HTTPS           # repeat for all other rules to be added here          Resource Name                   Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound/Outbound    Action         Comment            // replace with meaningful values if reused after template execution
- name: networkSecurityGroupRule_RDP           # repeat for all other rules to be added here          Resource Name                   Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound/Outbound    Action         Comment            // replace with meaningful values if reused after template execution
parameters:   - location               name                       type                         value                        (required)                            # AZURE LOCATION AND NAME                   Azure Resource Manager Template Location          string                          {  return get_parameter('location') }                           Name of the Network Security Group.              string      NsgName_{{uniqueid()}}          
- name: virtualNetworkSubnet                      # parameter for VNET subNet CIDR       value                        (required)                            // replace with meaningful values if reused after template execution     Virtual Subnets             Azure Resource Manager Template Location          object        /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{groupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetname}/subnets/{mysubnet}                          
- name: rdpRule                               # rule for RDP           Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound     tcp    port=3389             AnySource   VirtualNetwork          Allow              (comment is optional)                 1.0.2456
- name: httpRule                              # rule for HTTP        Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound     tcp    port=80               AnySource                 VPN Gateway                      Allow              (comment is optional)                 1.0.2456
- name: httpsRule                             # rule for HTTPS   Type                Protocol  Port Range(start,end)/Endport      Network Security Group       Inbound     tcp    port=443             AnySource                 VPN Gateway                      Allow              (comment is optional)                 1.0.2687
